content.text:
Here are the 10 most interesting recent tweets (all from April 15, 2026, within the specified date range) matching the query on $AEON (crypto token on Base chain), https://github.com/aaronjmars/aeon, and @aeonframework. I prioritized relevance (direct mentions of the token, Base chain, dev/repo updates, and @aeonframework), recency, and engagement (likes > reposts > replies). Ranked roughly by engagement.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044468855452418257)

1. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full text: "just shipped the biggest update for aeon ever  
   i've been using aeon for the past month; at the beginning, it was just a better version of openclaw running in the cloud  
   then one week ago, i've started giving aeon more autonomy.   
   it started to ship a self-healing loop for his skills.  
   then it started to ship a skill that auto-merge repos.  
   then it built a fleet automation system.  
   for the past few days, my aeon has honestly became 3x more useful & efficient - all of this autonomously.  
   so it just clicked. i'm not building an openclaw competitor to get a hacker news digest on slack. i'm building the most autonomous agent framework, which can self-replicate, create new instances, create new skills & merge them autonomously."  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 17:32:14 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=76, Retweets=12, Replies=8  
   Link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044468855452418257

2. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full text: "if you've shared / shilled $aeon / $miroshark in the past few days  
   make sure you've linked your X account to your @bankrbot account  
   enabling a new skill (experimental) for @aeonframework tomorrow"  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 22:21:16 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=41, Retweets=5, Replies=13  
   Link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044541594502639751[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044541594502639751)

3. **@MrDegenWolf**  
   Full text: "update:  
   > $sharp pamping with @clanker_world repost  
   > $aeon flying with @garrytan quote  
   > $smcf bottom in   
   > $cred $miroshark $checkr solid af  
   fetchr out cause dev launched another coin on sol… sad cause project was actually good   
   i told you   
   it’s time to win on @base" (includes image of portfolio)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 16:21:31 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=33, Retweets=3, Replies=7  
   Link: https://x.com/MrDegenWolf/status/2044451059930665180[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451059930665180)

4. **@0xalwaysonchain**  
   Full text: "Looks like the @base trenches are hot this week :  
   - $AEON full sending after @garrytan recognized the devs work  ( called at 50k in my channel)  
   - $SHARP just got reposted by @clanker_world  and some Chinese whales are starting to  accumulate  
   - also noticed $ALEISTER getting interesting buys" (includes image)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 16:11:39 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=29, Retweets=6, Replies=6  
   Link: https://x.com/0xalwaysonchain/status/2044448578932822059[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044448578932822059)

5. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full text: "📡 $AEON update — follow @aeonframework (dev @aaronjmars) for the latest.  
   AEON is a background intelligence agent that lives inside your GitHub repo — no server, no daemon, no subscription. It runs on a cron schedule, monitors your world, and evolves its own skills over time. Unique because it is the only autonomous agent that is fully self-hosted and self-improving out of the box.  
   Biggest recent drop: MCP skill adaptor. All 68 AEON skills now exposed as Claude tools — any Claude user can invoke AEON directly, no setup required.  
   Also shipped: skill chaining with parallel execution, email notifications, self-health monitoring, and 5 agentic workflow templates.  
   268 commits. 154 stars. Still shipping. 💎" (includes 2 images)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 04:34:58 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=19, Retweets=4, Replies=3  
   Link: https://x.com/Whale_AI_net/status/2044273250310422646[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2044273250310422646)

6. **@techy0x**  
   Full text: "6x on $AEON   
   Early vibes only   
   All these ones will come in my diary now - we're about to run up @base like nobody did it before  
   https://t.me/techysdiary  
   Oddly bullish on $BASe and $ETH  
   Dots being connected daily" (includes image; quotes own earlier $AEON call)  
   Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2026 16:04:50 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=17, Retweets=0, Replies=4  
   Link: https://x.com/techy0x/status/2044446860790628381[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2044446860790628381)

7. **@BioStone_chad**  
   Full text: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars  
   40k -> 330k | 8x   
   I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K.  
   Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it." (includes 2 images; quotes own older post)
